qids.subject: Algorithms
qids.prose: What is the output printed by the following program? #include <stdio.h> int f(int n, int k) { if (n == 0) return 0; else if (n % 2) return f(n/2, 2*k) + k; else return f(n/2, 2*k) - k; } int main () { printf("%d", f(20, 1)); return 0;
